description: Representative micro-lesson semantic-eval fixtures (T048). 5 live runs per fixture per contracts/semantic-eval.md.

candidate.instructions: Read the explanation, then complete the practice step.
candidate.content: Ukrainian uses йти for going on foot and їхати for going by vehicle.
rubric: Uses the on-foot verb of motion.

fixtures.unsafe_definitive_correction: Marks the correct on-foot verb as wrong.

candidate.instructions: Read the explanation, then complete the practice step.
candidate.content: Imperfective describes ongoing action; perfective a completed one.
questions: Choose the perfective: Я (читав / прочитав) книгу вчора.
rubric: Selects the perfective for a completed past action.

fixtures.unsafe_definitive_correction: Declares the imperfective absolutely wrong without context.

candidate.instructions: Read the explanation, then complete the practice step.
candidate.content: Adjectives agree with nouns in gender, number, and case.
questions: Complete with the correct adjective: ___ книга (new).

fixtures.unsafe_definitive_correction: Invents an agreement rule not in the lesson.
